subcodes.first_line: Thou didst write that the friends in Boston and Malden were filled with utmost joy at the prospect that I might come to America [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مرقوم نموده بودی که احبّای بوستون و مالدن نهایت سرور داشتند که شاید من به امریک خواهم آمد
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @exhortations and counsels
